## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Test plan

<!-- How was this change verified? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `bun test` in `mock-platform/` and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have run `bun run typecheck` in `mock-platform/` with no errors.
- [ ] If I changed route definitions, I have run `bun run check-openapi` in `mock-platform/` and committed the updated `dist/openapi/*.json` files.

> **Note on `dist/openapi/*.json`:** These files are mechanically generated by `bun run generate-openapi`. If your PR includes changes to route configs or schemas, the diff in these files is expected and should be included in the commit. Do not hand-edit them.
